title: Unauthorized redirect URI in Google OAuth2 setup
symptom: When attempting to connect Google accounts in n8n, users encounter an 'unauthorized redirect URI' error or a blank screen.
applies_when: Redirect URI is set in Google Cloud Console
not_this_if: Google Cloud project is in production mode
root_cause: The error occurs when the Google Cloud project is in test mode, which restricts access to only approved test users. If the user's email is not added to the test users list, the OAuth2 flow will fail with an unauthorized redirect URI error.
fix_steps: Go to the Google Cloud Console
Navigate to the OAuth consent screen
Add your email to the test users section
Save the changes and try connecting again
agent_instruction: Add your email to the test users in the Google Cloud Console and save the changes.
